Notes: Single UPDATE contains an add_rr and delete_rr for the exact same owner/type/RDATA. The follow-up QUERY observes whether the RR remains present or absent after the server processes the update message.

Steps.Description: Add and delete the same A RR for x.campus.edu. in one UPDATE.

Steps.Name: x.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset is unchanged, absent, or otherwise affected by intra-UPDATE cancellation semantics.
